programme.desc: FBI agent Will Graham tracks a killer called the “Tooth Fairy” and turns to jailed Hannibal Lecter for help, risking everything if he can’t be trusted.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: A casino manager in 1970s Las Vegas faces threats from a troubled old friend, an FBI investigation, corrupt politicians, and his wife’s painful past. This crime drama explores power, betrayal, and the unraveling of a man’s empire.

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: A young boy growing up in Belfast during the late 1960s sees his childhood and family life change as rising conflict and social unrest begin to disrupt his world.

programme.title: The Boxer
programme.desc: After being in prison for his involvement with the IRA, Danny Flynn re-opens a boxing ring in effort to heal his Belfast community, finding that a legacy of violence is not easily escaped.

programme.desc: A small-town police chief (Tom Selleck) investigates the life of an unhappy teen after her corpse is found floating in a lake.

programme.desc: New to town, a bullied teenager discovers a doll, riddled with pins, in her backyard shed. She soon comes to believe that the doll holds supernatural powers.

programme.desc: When a DC Reporter investigates the murder of an assistant to an up-and-coming politician, he uncovers a conspiracy that threatens to bring down the nation's power structures.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: Forced to traffic a new drug in her stomach, a woman's life changes when they accidently rupture and unlock her full mind's potential, causing her to evolve into a super human.

programme.title: Forrest Gump

programme.desc: The mummified body of Imhotep is shipped to a museum in London, where he once again wakes and begins his campaign of rage and terror.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: A disgraced cop infiltrates the Miami street racing scene with an ex-con to redeem himself by bringing down a drug lord.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Set in 1998, this origin story explores the secrets of the mysterious Spencer Mansion and the ill-fated Raccoon City.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex con is out to avenge the murder of his brother during a botched robbery, but the circumstances of the actual killing become muddled and the killer obscure.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: Two rivals reunite in Los Angeles when a crime brings them face to face again. Forced to work together against a shared enemy, they push their limits behind the wheel in a high-stakes chase for revenge.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. It's now up to an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the Universe needs.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: When his wife and child are in danger, a young prince from the Draculea dynasty makes a dark sacrifice to save them. He becomes the first vampire and the man who inspires the legend of Dracula.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: In ancient China, a group of European mercenaries encounters a secret army that maintains and defends the Great Wall of China against a horde of monstrous creatures.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: After a devastating betrayal, kind-hearted Queen Freya unleashes dark powers and wages war on love, claiming warriors Eric and Sara as victims.

programme.title: Indiana Jones And The Temple Of Doom
programme.desc: Barely escaping a raging Shanghai nightclub brawl, Indy crash-lands into the wilds of India where he uncovers a sinister scheme that has enslaved a remote village's children in a fortress-like mine.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A gang of double-crossed thieves attempt to reclaim their stolen gold and avenge their mentor's death by creating the largest ever traffic jam in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating a highly skilled international rogue organisation that is committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: A beautiful CIA officer accused of being a Russian spy must go on the run to clear her name and identify a would-be presidential assassin.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: When motorcycle rider Johnny Blaze sells his soul to the Devil to save his father's life, he is transformed into the Ghost Rider, the Devil's own bounty hunter, and is sent to hunt down sinners.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: After a devastating betrayal, kind-hearted Queen Freya unleashes dark powers and wages war on love, claiming warriors Eric and Sara as victims.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: MI6's most lethal assassin is sent on a covert mission into Cold War Berlin where she must use all of the spy-craft, sensuality, and savagery she has to stay alive.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk's out to emulate his father's deeds. Spock keeps him in check as an evil Romulan creates black holes to destroy the Federation. The fate of the galaxy rests in the hands of bitter rivals born worlds apart.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: In a future where extreme sports has grown into reality TV bloodlust, Jason Statham stars as a speedway champion ordered by a ruthless warden to suit up and drive, or never see his little girl again.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: A family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound.

programme.title: xXx 3: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: Xander Cage is recruited to lead a team of death-defying adrenaline junkies on a mission to kick some ass.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: After being denied his dream job with the Secret Service, a cop with a bad attitude must save his daughter and the President after heavily armed militants take over the White House.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When two detectives are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the alluring and lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: The wealthy live in luxury on a space station while the rest fight for scraps on a ruined Earth. Then one man is given an opportunity to even the score.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: In futuristic Toronto a repo man pursues customers that can no longer pay for their implanted organs.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as a hitman whose latest mission puts him on a bullet train travelling from Tokyo to Morioka, alongside deadly adversaries from around the world. The question is: who will make it off the train alive at the final station?

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Dispatched on a rescue mission to the farthest reaches of space, Captain Kirk, Spock and the crew become separated when they are ambushed with no means of escape.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge Of The Fallen
programme.desc: Two years after saving the world, Sam Witwicky returns to university as the Autobots and humans work together to stop a returning Decepticon threat, while pressure builds to remove the robots from Earth.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: True account of the disastrous US raid to capture a Somali warlord in 1993. When the mission goes wrong elite forces must fight their way out.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Over one day across the streets of LA, three lives will change forever. Desperate brothers hijack an ambulance after their heist goes awry, spiralling into the most insane escape.

programme.title: Dead Again In Tombstone
programme.desc: After saving himself from an eternity in Hell, Guerrero continues to roam the Wild West collecting bounties on behalf of Lucifer.

programme.title: Warcraft: The Beginning
programme.desc: An epic adventure that sees a peaceful realm on the brink of war. Two heroes will be set on a collision course that will decide the fate of their family, their people and their home.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: In this reunion of the fast and the furious, the speedsters are off to Brazil to attempt to defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all wiped out.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: The lead-footed crew reunites in this turbo-fuelled tale of the vengeful brother of an international terrorist who sets his bloody sights on the boy racers that took his sibling down.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Based on the classic Hasbro naval combat game, this is the story of an international fleet of ships that come across an alien armada while on a Naval war games exercise.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego "Venom" to save his life.

programme.title: Snow White And The Huntsman
programme.desc: In a twist to the fairy tale, the evil Queen Ravenna orders the Huntsman to capture Snow White so she can rule eternally; however, he trains her in the art of war to defeat the wicked ruler.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A security repairman stationed on a desolate future Earth rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft. Her arrival will trigger a chain of events that will leave man's fate in his hands.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark Of The Moon
programme.desc: An event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Age Of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Brass track down a serial killer, and Willows and Brown investigate a robbery/homicide. Also, the team members take turns training Gribbs, new to the team and fresh out of the police academy.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The investigation of the shooting of Holly Gribbs continues, while Grissom and Stokes examine the murder of a Las Vegas mega-winner.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team investigate a bomb explosion, and Nick is framed for a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine search for human remains and Warrick and Sara investigate the king of a stripper-for-hire outfit.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team examine the evidence in an attempt to find out why the dead body of a woman is found in a swimming pool.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigate the case of a woman who was sexually assaulted, shot and left for dead, and Catherine and Warrick help the DA try to solve a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine's robbery/homicide investigation leads to a bizarre discovery, while Warrick and Sara try to solve the case of a woman burnt to ashes.

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: Polish pilots overcome prejudice to fight against the Luftwaffe with the Royal Air Force during the Second World War, in the hope of protecting both Great Britain and their own Poland from the German advance.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: Absolutely Anything will follow a disillusioned school teacher, Neil Clarke (Pegg) who suddenly finds he has the ability to do anything he wishes, a challenge bestowed upon him by a group of power-crazed aliens (voiced by Cleese, Gilliam, Jones, Palin & Idle), watching him from space. As he struggles to deal with these new found powers and the events that subsequently arise, he calls upon his loyal canine companion Dennis (voiced by Robin Williams) to help him along the way.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Seagull
programme.desc: One summer at a lakeside Russian estate, friends and family gather for a weekend in the countryside. While everyone is caught up in passionately loving someone who loves somebody else, a tragicomedy unfolds about art, fame, human folly, and the eternal desire to live a purposeful life. Aristocratic actress Irina (Annette Bening, 20th Century Women) pays summer visits to her brother Sorin (Brian Dennehy, First Blood) and her son Konstantin (Billy Howle, On Chesil Beach). On one occasion, her lover, the successful novelist Boris Trigorin (Corey Stoll, Midnight in Paris), accompanies her. When Nina (Saoirse Ronan, Lady Bird), a free and innocent girl who lives on a neighbouring estate, falls in love with Boris, he basks in her adulation, while Irina is shunned by Konstantin, who loves Nina. Based on Anton Chekhov’s classic play, 'The Seagull' explores, with comedy and melancholy, the obsessive nature of love, the tangled relationships between parents and children, and the transcendent value and psychic toll of art.

programme.title: Pin Cushion
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, socially awkward Iona and her cat-obsessed mother Lyn move to a new town. Together the pair put on a brave face, finding and creating comfort as one another’s sole friend. However, life begins to get tricky after the town’s small-minded denizens reveal themselves to be as petty and cruel as those from the town they just fled. At school, Iona finds herself targeted by a trio of mean girls who exploit her naïveté. Across town, Lyn attempts to make friends and is flatly rejected by a knitting circle of mean women who find her very existence repugnant. Daughter and mother find refuge in an elaborate fantasy world founded on denial and delusion; ultimately distance between them just when they need each other most.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Summerland
programme.desc: During World War II, reclusive writer Alice has her sequestered life upended when Frank, an evacuee from the London Blitz, is left in her care.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The extraordinary and epic true story of Eric Lomax, a British Army officer who is tormented as a prisoner of war at a Japanese labour camp during World War II. Decades later, Lomax and his beautiful love interest, Patti, discover that the Japanese interpreter responsible for much of his treatment is still alive. They set out to confront him, and Eric's haunting past, in this powerful and inspiring tale of heroism, humanity and the redeeming power of love.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: A Medieval 'Magnificent Seven', that combines the visceral, stylized action of '300' with the impassioned heroism and romance of 'Braveheart'. Starring James Purefoy (Solomon Kane), Brian Cox (The Bourne Supremacy), and Paul Giamatti (Shoot 'Em Up), IRONCLAD is an ultra-violent action thriller that tells the true story of a motley crew of tough, battle hardened warriors, who withstood several brutal and bloody months under siege, in a desperate bid to defend their country's freedom...
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: Distraught, confused, and half-wild with fear, Sarah Carter emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system where she encountered unspeakable terrors. Unable to plausibly explain to the authorities what happened - or why she's covered in her friends' blood - Sarah is forced back to the subterranean depths to help locate her five missing companions.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: Absolutely Anything will follow a disillusioned school teacher, Neil Clarke (Pegg) who suddenly finds he has the ability to do anything he wishes, a challenge bestowed upon him by a group of power-crazed aliens (voiced by Cleese, Gilliam, Jones, Palin & Idle), watching him from space. As he struggles to deal with these new found powers and the events that subsequently arise, he calls upon his loyal canine companion Dennis (voiced by Robin Williams) to help him along the way.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Comes a Bright Day
programme.desc: Love blossoms in the most unusual circumstances when young bellboy Sam and beautiful shop assistant Mary (Imogen Poots, 28 Weeks Later) are kidnapped by brutal armed robbers (Kevin McKidd, Trainspotting; Josef Altin, Eastern Promises) intent on stealing a £1 million brooch. Taken hostage along with belligerent shop owner Charlie (Timothy Spall, The King’s Speech), the young couple find themselves falling for each other on this terrifying ‘first date’. This tense and stylish British thriller proves that sometimes extreme pressure can reveal a hidden gem.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Pin Cushion

programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: Mary Shelley tells the story of Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, author of the famous Gothic novels "Frankenstein", and her fiery relationship with renowned romantic poet Percy Bysshe Shelley. The pair are two outsiders constrained by society but bound together by progressive ideas that are beyond the boundaries of their age and time.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Nothing Like a Dame
programme.desc: From time to time four old friends, all extraordinary actresses, meet up in the English countryside to gossip, to remember and to laugh. For once they let the cameras in... Nothing Like A Dame is a unique celebration of the lives and careers of four of our most iconic actresses: Dame Eileen Atkins, Dame Judi Dench, Dame Joan Plowright and Dame Maggie Smith. All four have gone from being fledgling actresses in the 1950s to acting royalty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Almond and the Seahorse
programme.desc: What happens when you're ambushed by time? An archaeologist and an architect fight to re-imagine a future after traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ali & Ava
programme.desc: Sparks fly after Ali and Ava meet through their shared affection for Sofia, the child of Ali’s tenants whom Ava teaches. Ali finds comfort in Ava’s warmth and kindness while Ava finds Ali’s complexity and humour irresistible. As the pair begin to form a deep connection they have to find a way to keep their newfound passion from being overshadowed by the stresses and struggles of their separate lives and histories.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: A talking cat, a pack of intelligent rats, and a fake pied piper work together scamming villages by charging them for dealing with staged plagues of rats, until one of their targets winds up having a far more sinister secret than their own.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: In 1967, three generations of spirited friends from Dublin chase miracles on a pilgrimage to Lourdes — and navigate unexpected revelations along the way.

programme.title: Set Fire to the Stars
programme.desc: Based on true events, Elijah Wood stars as John Malcolm Brinnin, the New York academic who brought Dylan Thomas to America. Actor/co-writer Celyn Jones plays the volatile celebrity poet – tormented by anonymity, alcohol and the abyss – who scandalized the Manhattan literati of the Fifties and challenged Brinnin’s hero worship of his work. In the face of the Welsh poet’s wilder excesses in the Big Apple – angel, beast and madman – John has no choice but to hijack Dylan to a private retreat to get him ready for America. The days and nights that follow will change his life forever. Part literary biopic and – shot in cut-glass black-and-white – part love-letter to the American B-movies of the Forties and Fifties, Andy Goddard’s debut feature is both a character driven chamber piece and a cautionary tale about the fly trap of meeting your heroes.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Gospel of Us
programme.desc: This project is the film version of the Passion play that was performed throughout Port Talbot in Easter 2011.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: Mary Shelley tells the story of Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, author of the famous Gothic novels "Frankenstein", and her fiery relationship with renowned romantic poet Percy Bysshe Shelley. The pair are two outsiders constrained by society but bound together by progressive ideas that are beyond the boundaries of their age and time.

programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Infinity
programme.desc: Growing up poor in Madras, India, Srinivasa Ramanujan Iyengar earns admittance to Cambridge University during WWI, where he becomes a pioneer in mathematical theories with the guidance of his professor, G.H. Hardy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: A Guide To Second Date Sex
programme.desc: How bad can a second date be? United by a love for Meryl Streep and hopeless relationships, one pair are about to find out. Comedy with Alexandra Roach and George MacKay.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: This is the story of the 1960s pop culture explosion, seen through the eyes of the British film legend Michael Caine. Caine himself narrates and appears in the film alongside The Beatles, Twiggy, Mary Quant, The Rolling Stones, and many other iconic names.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In the 1840s, acclaimed self-taught palaeontologist Mary Anning works alone on the wild and brutal Southern English coastline of Lyme Regis. The days of her famed discoveries behind her, she now hunts for common fossils to sell to rich tourists to support herself and her ailing widowed mother. When one such tourist, Roderick Murchison, arrives in Lyme on the first leg of a European tour, he entrusts Mary with the care of his young wife Charlotte, who is recuperating from a personal tragedy. Mary, whose life is a daily struggle on the poverty line, cannot afford to turn him down but, proud and relentlessly passionate about her work, she clashes with her unwanted guest. They are two women from utterly different worlds. Yet despite the chasm between their social spheres and personalities, Mary and Charlotte discover they can each offer what the other has been searching for: the realisation that they are not alone. It is the beginning of a passionate and all-consuming love affair that will defy all social bounds and alter the course of both lives irrevocably.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Interlude in Prague
programme.desc: A powerful period thriller, starring James Purefoy (High-Rise), Samantha Barks (Les Misérables) and Aneurin Barnard (Dunkirk).1788, Mozart escapes Vienna to spend time in Prague. His presence unleashes a series of dramatic events set off by a forbidden affair with soprano Zuzana. A provocative twist on the Mozart biopic, with love, lust, murder and "Don Giovanni" - not your average costume drama!
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Urban Hymn
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of the 2011 British summer riots, Michael Caton-Jones' URBAN HYMN is a redemptive coming-of-age story following wayward teen, Jamie (Letitia Wright). Encouraged by inspiring and unconventional care worker Kate (Shirley Henderson) to use singing as a release from her troubled life, Jamie's loyalties soon become torn between Kate and her possessive and volatile best friend, Leanne (Isabella Laughland).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: White Riot
programme.desc: Rubika Shah’s energising film charts a vital national protest movement. Rock Against Racism (RAR) was formed in 1976, prompted by ‘music’s biggest colonialist’ Eric Clapton and his support of racist MP Enoch Powell. White Riot blends fresh interviews with queasy archive footage to recreate a hostile environment of anti-immigrant hysteria and National Front marches. As neo-Nazis recruited the nation’s youth, RAR’s multicultural punk and reggae gigs provided rallying points for resistance. As founder Red Saunders explains: ‘We peeled away the Union Jack to reveal the swastika’. The campaign grew from Hoxton fanzine roots to 1978’s huge antifascist carnival in Victoria Park, featuring X-Ray Spex, Steel Pulse and of course The Clash, whose rock star charisma and gale-force conviction took RAR’s message to the masses.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Neds
programme.desc: From acclaimed Director Peter Mullan comes NEDS, the story of a young man’s journey from prize winning schoolboy to knife carrying teenager. John McGill (an amazing performance from newcomer Conor McCarron) struggles with the low expectations of those around him and events take a maddening turn as he descends into shocking violence on a seemingly one man mission of self destruction.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Infinity
programme.desc: Growing up poor in Madras, India, Srinivasa Ramanujan Iyengar earns admittance to Cambridge University during WWI, where he becomes a pioneer in mathematical theories with the guidance of his professor, G.H. Hardy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Film Stars Don't Die in Liverpool
programme.desc: Based on Peter Turner's memoir, the film follows the playful but passionate relationship between Turner and the eccentric Academy Award-Winning Actress Gloria Grahame in 1978 Liverpool. What starts as a vibrant affair between a legendary femme fatale and her young lover quickly grows into a deeper relationship, with Turner being the person Gloria turns to for comfort. Their passion and lust for life is tested to the limits by events beyond their control.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Suffragette
programme.desc: Inspired by true events, Suffragette movingly explores the passion and heartbreak of those who risked all they had for women's right to vote - their jobs, their homes, their children, and even their lives.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Bright Young Things
programme.desc: Known to the press who follow their every move, as the 'Bright Young Things', Adam and his friends are eccentric, wild and entirely shocking to the older generation. Amidst all the madness, Adam is desperately trying to get enough money to marry the beautiful Nina. While his attempts are constantly thwarted, their friends seem one by one to self-destruct in their search for newer sensations.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Sometimes Always Never
programme.desc: The film focuses on scrabble-obsessed Merseyside tailor Alan, whose eldest son Michael stormed out of the house after a particularly heated round of the popular board game, never to return. Years later, Alan and his other son Peter continue the search while trying to repair their own strained relationship.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: An elderly retired marine takes the law into his own hands when his friend is murdered by hoodlums on a London estate.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug (David Tennant) and Abi (Rosamund Pike) and their three children travel to the Scottish Highlands for Doug's father Gordie's (Billy Connolly) birthday party. It's soon clear that when it comes to keeping a secret under wraps from the rest of the family, their children are their biggest liability…
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Descent
programme.desc: A woman goes on vacation with her friends after her husband and daughter encounter a tragic accident. One year later she goes hiking with her friends and they get trapped in the cave. With a lack of supply, they struggle to survive and they meet strange blood thirsty creatures.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Toast
programme.desc: Set in 1960s Britain, Toast is based on the bittersweet story of food writer Nigel Slater's childhood and his difficult journey into adulthood. (Helena Bonham Carter, Freddie Highmore)
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: Based on a true story, Red Joan brings to life the conflicts - between patriotism and idealism, love and duty, courage and betrayal - of a woman who spent a lifetime being underestimated while changing the course of history.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Chéri
programme.desc: In this superb drama set in pre-World War I Paris, an ageing courtesan has an ill-fated love affair with the son of her rival.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Attack The Block
programme.desc: Cult sci-fi comedy starring Jodie Whittaker, John Boyega, Nick Frost and Luke Treadaway. Bonfire night, South London. Sam, a trainee nurse, is making her way home when she's accosted by a gang of hooded teenage thugs demanding her wallet and phone. That is until a huge, flaming meteorite crash-lands into a nearby car. Sam makes her escape while the gang find themselves confronted by a rabid, ravenous extra-terrestrial with a craving for human flesh. Having killed the creature they soon realise that this is only the beginning. There are other aliens invading the earth and they're bigger, stronger and hungrier. Their only chance of survival is to take refuge within the concrete walls of their housing estate block. Teaming up with their initial victim Sam and local dealer Ron, the neighbourhood's biggest threat soon realise they could be the block's only hope. It's inner city versus outer space and it's about to get nasty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Whisky Galore!
programme.desc: Based on the infamous 1941 true story, Whisky Galore! is a charming and heart-warming tale of a close-knit Scottish island community who mischievously relieve a sinking cargo ship of cases of whisky during wartime scarcity. The ensuing merriment is threatened when Excise Men try to spoil the party by catching the crafty locals, red handed, with the bottled loot. After enduring a ‘dry’ period, the shipwreck and its amber cargo was like mana from heaven to the islanders, to whom whisky was part of the very life blood of their Island!”
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: McLaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: Instead of wanting to be like her older sister, who is preparing to be a traditional Indian wife, young Jess dreams of playing soccer professionally, like her hero David Beckham! Eventually, her family must decide whether or not to let Jess chase her dream – and a soccer ball – in this insightful romantic comedy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
